ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the product */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of loan product (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "collateral_required" INTEGER /* Whether collateral is required for the loan */,
  "insurance_required" INTEGER /* Whether insurance is required for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the interest rate (in %) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest rate */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of interest rate (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment term */,
  "term_value" INTEGER /* Value of the repayment term (in years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repayment term */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the application */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product applied for */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest rate chosen by the customer */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repayment term chosen by the customer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan applied for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., home improvement, debt consolidation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES interest_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES repayment_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_product_interest_rates" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate becomes effective for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_product_repayment_terms" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repayment term */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the repayment term becomes effective for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rate_repayment_terms" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest rate */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repayment term */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the repayment term becomes effective for the interest rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id", "term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_application_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, loan officer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment schedule */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of each repayment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of each repayment */,
  "interest_amount" REAL /* Interest amount of each repayment */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of each repayment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_schedules_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_application_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_application_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_application_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the credit report was generated */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., property, vehicle) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., life, disability) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)
